expectations.text: Asked 2-3 scoping questions (audience, goal/metric, timeline) and/or led with a one-page campaign brief
expectations.evidence: Leads with a one-page brief (audience, core message, primary metric) and appends 3 sharpening questions.

expectations.text: Provides a phased pre-launch / launch / post-launch structure
expectations.evidence: Explicit Pre-launch (wk -4 to 0), Launch (wk 0), Post-launch (wk 1-4) sections.
Checkbox asset checklist: landing page, app store listing, PH assets, emails, social posts, testimonials, analytics.

expectations.text: Pulls multiple modules (campaign + copy + email + measurement) without sprawling
expectations.evidence: Synthesizes campaign brief + copy (core message) + a 4-step lifecycle email sequence + measurement (activation north star) in one tight plan.
